title: Považská Bystrica, Trenčín Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Považská Bystrica, Trenčín Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Považská Bystrica is a city in Trenčín Region with a population of 39,000. An industrial town in northwestern Slovakia, known for its engineering and manufacturing sector, and a strategic location in the Váh River valley.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
